requirement: the README says what QUALITY.md is and who it's for

findings.observation: The opening sentence states what it is: 'QUALITY.md is an agent-friendly file format and companion agent skill and CLI for continuously improving the quality of coding agent and AI assistant projects/harnesses.'
A 'Why QUALITY.md' section names the problem solved (technical, cognitive, and intent debt) in the opening lines.
The audience is identified (coding-agent/AI-assistant projects and software development teams).

rationale: A first-time reader learns within the opening lines what a QUALITY.md file is, the problem it solves, and who it is for. Satisfies the requirement.
